mapper.sql: left join fd_material fm on fm.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null)
case when fm.is_gz = '1' then '1' else '2' end

m.id, m.tenant_id, m.visit_kind, m.fetch_batch_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id, m.his_outpatient_charge_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, m.inpatient_no, m.outpatient_no, m.dept_code, m.dept_name, m.clinic_code, m.clinic_name, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, m.charge_item_id, m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, m.use_date, m.charge_date_display, m.charge_at, m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, m.payment_type, m.receipt_no, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, m.process_party, m.process_situation, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time
mapper.select: select count(*) from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select ifnull((select count(*) from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId}), 0) + ifnull((select count(*) from his_outpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId}), 0)
mapper.insert: insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) select m.id, m.tenant_id, 'INPATIENT', m.fetch_batch_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id, null, m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, null, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, m.inpatient_no, null, m.dept_code, m.dept_name, null, null, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, trim(m.charge_item_id), m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, case when m.use_date is null or trim(ifnull(m.use_date,'')) = '' then null else str_to_date(left(trim(m.use_date), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') end, left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 64), coalesce( str_to_date(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(concat(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 10), ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), cast(m.charge_date as datetime) ), m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, null, null, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, ifnull(cim.value_level, '2'), m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and cim.charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and not exists (select 1 from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u where u.id = m.id)

insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) select m.id, m.tenant_id, 'OUTPATIENT', m.fetch_batch_id, null, m.his_outpatient_charge_id, null, m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, null, m.outpatient_no, null, null, m.clinic_code, m.clinic_name, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, trim(m.charge_item_id), m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, null, left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 64), coalesce( str_to_date(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(concat(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 10), ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ), m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, m.payment_type, m.receipt_no, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, ifnull(cim.value_level, '2'), m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from his_outpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and cim.charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and not exists (select 1 from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u where u.id = m.id)

insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.outpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.clinicCode}, #{e.clinicName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDateDisplay}, #{e.chargeAt}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.paymentType}, #{e.receiptNo}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.processType}, #{e.processTime}, #{e.processBy}, #{e.valueLevel}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.update: update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set process_status = #{processStatus}, process_type = #{processType}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}
mapper.select:
select , as value_level from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified m
order by m.charge_at desc, m.id desc
